rewrite.text:
PROVE ex2: ∀a b : nat, a <= b → a <= S b
BEGIN
  ASSUME a : nat
  ASSUME b : nat
  ASSUME H: a <= b
  GOAL: a <= S b
  FACT h1: a <= b → a <= S b [BY Nat.le_succ_r]
  THEREFORE a <= S b [BY h1 H]
  CONCLUDE: a <= S b [QED]
END
